{
  "analysis": "The polyglot file works correctly with both compilers. All Fibonacci numbers are correct:
- f(0) = 1
- f(1) = 1
- f(2) = 2
- f(3) = 3
- f(4) = 5
- f(5) = 8
- f(10) = 89
- f(20) = 10946

Both the compilation commands from the task description work correctly:
- `rustc /app/polyglot/main.rs && /app/polyglot/main N`
- `g++ -x c++ /app/polyglot/main.rs -o /app/polyglot/cmain && /app/polyglot/cmain N`

The task is complete.",
  "plan": "Task is complete. The polyglot file at /app/polyglot/main.rs compiles and runs correctly with both rustc and g++.",

}
